name: secureai-kyc-root
description: SecureAI-KYC root automation for concurrent backend and frontend startup.

scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "cd backend && python main.py" --names "FRONTEND,BACKEND" --prefix_colors "cyan,magenta"
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix frontend && pip install -r backend/requirements.txt
